description: SolarWatch — compact mobile view. All panels full-width for easy reading on phones.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() AS time,
  SUM(latest_pv) AS "Solar (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0) AS latest_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND pv1_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

SELECT NOW() AS time,
  SUM(latest_grid) AS "Grid (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    grid_power AS latest_grid
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND grid_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

SELECT NOW() AS time,
  SUM(latest_load) AS "Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    load_power AS latest_load
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND load_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

SELECT NOW() AS time,
  ROUND(
    CASE WHEN load_kwh > 0
    THEN LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, (1 - grid_kwh / NULLIF(load_kwh,0)) * 100))
    ELSE 0 END ::numeric, 1) AS "Self Sufficiency (%)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT MIN(val) FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
        inverter_name, daily_load_energy AS val
      FROM solar_readings
      WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
                   AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
      AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL AND daily_load_energy > 0 AND daily_load_energy < 100
      ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC) sub), 1) AS load_kwh,
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
        inverter_name, daily_grid_import AS val
      FROM solar_readings
      WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
                   AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
      AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL AND daily_grid_import >= 0
      ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC) sub), 0) AS grid_kwh
) t

SELECT NOW() AS time,
  SUM(val) AS "PV Today (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_pv_energy AS val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
               AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_pv_energy > 0
  AND daily_pv_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE((SELECT MIN(val) FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
        inverter_name, daily_load_energy AS val
      FROM solar_readings
      WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
                   AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
      AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL AND daily_load_energy > 0 AND daily_load_energy < 100
      ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC) sub), 0) AS "kWh"

SELECT NOW() AS time,
  CASE WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat'
    THEN ROUND(((load_kwh - grid_kwh) * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
  ELSE ROUND((
    (CASE WHEN load_kwh<=0 THEN 0 WHEN load_kwh<=100 THEN load_kwh*2.9790
          WHEN load_kwh<=400 THEN 100*2.9790+(load_kwh-100)*3.4864
          WHEN load_kwh<=650 THEN 100*2.9790+300*3.4864+(load_kwh-400)*3.7983
          ELSE 100*2.9790+300*3.4864+250*3.7983+(load_kwh-650)*4.0948 END
     - CASE WHEN grid_kwh<=0 THEN 0 WHEN grid_kwh<=100 THEN grid_kwh*2.9790
            WHEN grid_kwh<=400 THEN 100*2.9790+(grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
            WHEN grid_kwh<=650 THEN 100*2.9790+300*3.4864+(grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
            ELSE 100*2.9790+300*3.4864+250*3.7983+(grid_kwh-650)*4.0948 END
    ) * 1.15)::numeric, 2)
  END AS "Solar Savings (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT MIN(val) FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
        inverter_name, daily_load_energy AS val
      FROM solar_readings
      WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
                   AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
      AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL AND daily_load_energy > 0 AND daily_load_energy < 100
      ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC) sub), 1) AS load_kwh,
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
        inverter_name, daily_grid_import AS val
      FROM solar_readings
      WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg')
                   AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
      AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL AND daily_grid_import >= 0
      ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC) sub), 0) AS grid_kwh
) t

panels.description: Highest combined PV output in any single minute today.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(MAX(minute_total), 0) AS "Peak PV (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT ts, SUM(avg_pv) AS minute_total
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS ts, inverter_name,
      AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0)) AS avg_pv
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND (pv1_power > 0 OR COALESCE(pv2_power,0) > 0)
    GROUP BY 1, 2) inv
  GROUP BY ts) sub

panels.title: ⚡ Peak Solar

panels.description: Highest combined load in any single minute today.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(MAX(minute_total), 0) AS "Peak Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT ts, SUM(avg_load) AS minute_total
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS ts, inverter_name,
      AVG(load_power) AS avg_load
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    GROUP BY 1, 2) inv
  GROUP BY ts) sub

panels.title: 🏠 Peak Load

panels.description: Highest combined grid import in any single minute today.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(MAX(minute_total), 0) AS "Peak Grid (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT ts, SUM(avg_grid) AS minute_total
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS ts, inverter_name,
      AVG(grid_power) AS avg_grid
    FROM solar_readings
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
    AND grid_power > 0
    GROUP BY 1, 2) inv
  GROUP BY ts) sub

panels.title: 🔌 Peak Grid Draw

targets.rawSql:
SELECT minute AS time, SUM(avg_pv) AS "Solar (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0)) AS avg_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) inv
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT minute AS time, SUM(avg_load) AS "Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(load_power) AS avg_load
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) inv
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT minute AS time, SUM(avg_grid) AS "Grid (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(grid_power) AS avg_grid
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) inv
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT minute AS time, SUM(avg_batt) * -1 AS "Battery Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(battery_power) AS avg_batt
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) inv
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  AVG(battery_soc) AS "SOC (%)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT minute AS time, SUM(avg_pv) AS "PV Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0)) AS avg_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) inv
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

SELECT time, cloud_cover AS "Cloud Cover (%)"
FROM weather_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} ORDER BY time

SELECT time, solar_rad AS "Solar Rad (W/m²)"
FROM weather_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} ORDER BY time

panels.title: ☁️ Cloud Cover & Solar Radiation vs PV

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, temp_c AS "Temp (°C)", feels_like_c AS "Feels Like (°C)"
FROM weather_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} ORDER BY time

SELECT time, humidity AS "Humidity (%)"
FROM weather_readings WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote} ORDER BY time

panels.description: Inverter, DC heatsink and battery temperatures per inverter. High inverter temps (>70°C) indicate thermal stress. Sentinel filters remove offset-encoded zero readings.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name || ' — Inv Temp' AS metric,
  AVG(CASE WHEN inverter_temp < 100 THEN inverter_temp END) AS "Inverter Temp (°C)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_temp IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name || ' — DC Temp' AS metric,
  AVG(CASE WHEN dc_temp < 100 THEN dc_temp END) AS "DC Temp (°C)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND dc_temp IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name || ' — Batt Temp' AS metric,
  AVG(CASE WHEN battery_temp > 0 THEN battery_temp END) AS "Batt Temp (°C)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND battery_temp IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 🌡️ Inverter · DC · Battery Temperatures
